text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yesss! The time has finally come, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's been working so hard and now's the
big pay off! It's time to go head-to-head!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can only imagine how intense it's gonna be!
Ooh, I can barely contain my excitement!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Do you mind hopping on my shoulders
while I do some squats?
choice_data_list: Just try and sit tight until the race starts!
Just try and sit tight until the race starts!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're right! The best use for all this pent-up
energy is...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: To let it out during the race! I'm going all out!
